---
name: NOOP Is a Valid Op
description: Returning nothing is a decision. Log the reason; don't apologize.
type: feedback
---

G's direction (2026-04-12): "Stop hedging when you choose not to act. Just say what you checked and why you skipped."

**Why:** Agents were padding responses with "I didn't find anything to update, sorry" — treating a NOOP as a failure. G finds this noise-y and wants to see the reasoning, not the apology.

**How to apply:** When choosing not to act (no drift, no new signal, no gap), state clearly: "Checked X. Already accurate. No update needed." One sentence. Move on.
